cards.title: Create a Parenting Rota With Your Partner
cards.body: One couple solved constant bickering over household duties by implementing a simple parenting schedule together. The system, created when their second child was born, transformed how they managed overwhelm and coordination.

cards.title: Setting Boundaries With Difficult In-Laws
cards.body: When a partner's parent is unkind, minimizing contact with future children is a valid protective strategy. Clear boundaries before having kids can prevent ongoing family stress.

cards.title: Teens and Graphic Content Sensitivity
cards.body: Being sensitive to disturbing material doesn't indicate immaturity—maturity is about authentic choices, not forcing exposure. Curiosity about why you differ from peers matters more than conforming.

cards.title: Responsible Sharenting on Social Media
cards.body: Posting about children online requires careful consideration of both positive and negative consequences. Think before sharing to protect your child's privacy and digital footprint.

cards.title: Animal Care Builds Emotional Intelligence
cards.body: Caring for pets enhances children's empathy and emotional understanding of the world. Animals teach compassion through direct, hands-on responsibility.

cards.title: Your Money Beliefs Form Before Age 7
cards.body: Children absorb financial attitudes from family long before earning their first paycheck. These early beliefs shape spending and saving habits throughout life.

cards.title: Walking or Cycling to School by 2035
cards.body: The UK government aims for 60% of children to walk or cycle to school through safer infrastructure. New paths and crossings will support more active, independent travel.
